summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TabPilot Chrome Extension with new features. Backend APIs working perfectly (5/5). Most frontend features working well including Focus Mode, Heatmap with SVG charts, Tab Suspension, and proper spacing. Main issue: Dark mode not activated by default despite implementation being present.

ui_bugs.issue: Dark mode not activated by default - app shows light theme instead of required GitHub black (#0d1117)
ui_bugs.details: Theme toggle buttons (Light/Dark/System) exist in settings but are non-functional. Manual dark mode activation via CSS works correctly.
ui_bugs.evidence: Background shows rgb(240, 242, 244) instead of GitHub dark. CSS variables show light mode values (--background: 210 17% 95%)

design_issues.issue: App defaults to light mode instead of required GitHub-style black background
design_issues.required_fix: Ensure dark mode is default active state or fix theme switcher functionality

passed_tests: Backend API endpoints all working (GET /api/, GET /api/sessions, POST /api/sessions, DELETE /api/sessions)
Focus Mode activation with timer and top 5 workflow tabs display
Tab suspension functionality with toast notifications and '(suspended)' text
Heatmap panel with SVG line chart (Weekly Activity) and bar chart (Visits by Domain)
Most Visited Tabs section with visit counts and memory usage
Window spacing (mb-1) instead of divider lines working correctly
Tab items proper padding (px-3) and indentation for grouped tabs
Chrome system fonts implementation correct (-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, etc.)
Stats bar showing memory, CPU, audible, and duplicate counts
Context menu with suspend/unsuspend tab options
All quick action buttons functional (New Tab, New Window, Close Duplicates, Mute All, Group Domain)
Duplicate detection working in stats bar
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix dark mode default activation: The theme system is implemented correctly but not activated by default. Either make dark mode the default state or fix the theme toggle buttons (Light/Dark/System) in settings panel to properly switch themes. Dark mode CSS works when manually applied via JavaScript.
